subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord of the kingdom and the realm above, Who through the Most Exalted Word hath adorned the realities of existence and the hearts with the ornament of recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک ملک و ملکوت را لایق که از کلمه علیا حقایق وجود را بطراز اقبال و قلوب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @station of the Manifestation of God, @Seal of the Prophets, @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
